Wayve (a16z speedrun)

Figma, Jitter, After Effects, Fal

Project

Role

I led GTM creative for Wayve across brand expression, product narrative, and launch storytelling.

The objective was to communicate a consumer AI video experience in a way that felt immediate and understandable.

Style

Wayve leans into cinematic motion with a lightweight UI language so product interaction remains the hero.

Typography and transitions are designed to feel fluid, responsive, and mobile-first.

Design

The design workflow started in Figma for structure, then moved into motion tools for timing and narrative polish.

Reusable components made it easy to produce variants for announcements, product demos, and social cuts.

Channels

Distribution centered on short-form surfaces where visual clarity drives first-touch interest.

Each cut preserves the same product promise while adapting pacing to platform expectations.

System

Figma, Jitter, After Effects, and Fal were combined into a repeatable pipeline from concept to final export.

The system prioritized speed without losing brand consistency.

Team

Jason Festa - Design GTM

Sanjit Juneja - Product

Motion collaborators - Editorial execution
